name: gb

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show git status grouped by service

commands.name: affected
commands.description: List services with changes vs a base branch

options.description: Create a branch with a custom name (no service/type)

commands.name: commit
commands.description: Stage and commit files for a service

options.description: Commit type (feat, fix, refactor, test, docs, chore, ci, perf)

commands.name: checkout
commands.description: Checkout a branch and pull latest changes

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Show diff for a service or all

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Delete local branches that no longer exist on remote

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run a package.json script in a service

examples: gb branch --custom "best branch of them all"
gb commit frontend --topic "add auth" -m "supports OAuth and email"
